codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly addresses all 3 files specified in the feature description: (1) wrangler.jsonc — removed the GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET comment line, keeping only GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN; (2) README.md — removed the GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET line from the environment variables section; (3) app/api/github-webhook/route.ts — replaced the generic comment with a clear two-line comment explaining that signature verification is disabled without the secret and how to enable it. Build verified successfully. One non-blocking observation: RESUME_SETUP.md (lines 44 and 54) still references GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET, but this file was not listed in the feature scope, and the feature description explicitly limited changes to the 3 files mentioned.

issues.description: RESUME_SETUP.md still references GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET in two places (lines 44 and 54), telling users to set the secret in environment variables. While not in the feature's explicit scope (which only listed wrangler.jsonc, README.md, and route.ts), this is a residual reference that contradicts the intent of removing webhook secret references since the user doesn't have one.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md still lists GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET in its 'Environment Variables' section, despite this feature removing the reference from production-facing docs. The shared state is now stale.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line: '- `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` — used by github-webhook API route' — this was not updated by the worker, likely because AGENTS.md was not in the feature's explicit file list.

sharedStateObservations.observation: .factory/library/environment.md still lists GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET as a required environment variable, making it inconsistent with the actual project state after this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md line: '- `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` — HMAC signature verification for GitHub webhooks'

summary: PASS. The worker correctly implemented all 3 changes specified in the feature description: removed GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET from wrangler.jsonc comments, removed it from README.md env vars section, and added a clarifying comment in the webhook route. Build verification passed. One non-blocking issue: RESUME_SETUP.md still references the secret (outside feature scope). Two shared state observations: AGENTS.md and .factory/library/environment.md are now stale regarding GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
